allow: PowerShell(foreach \($p in 5173,5174,8787\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } } }; "cleared")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; "stopped")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "port 8787 cleared")
